title: Atomic Clash
tagline: Rebuild the periodic table in 3D — or match it from memory.
description: Two element games in one. SORT: a shuffled cloud of element cards floats in 3D — orbit, zoom, pick a card and drop it into its slot to rebuild the whole periodic table. MATCH: flip-pairs memory built from the same cards. Pick 20, 40, 80, or all 118.
author: Atlas Bank
